都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

We once discussed veterinary medicine from the perspective of how humans came to the idea of helping other living creatures while spending their own time and resources on it. Strictly speaking, this mostly applies to pets, because in the industrial world veterinarians often work with farm animals. Today I want you to think about how incredibly complex this science really is. A veterinarian has to understand the anatomy and physiology of dozens of different species in order to help them. From a tiny aquarium fish to a massive python, any creature may need care, and it is honestly impressive how veterinarians manage to keep all of this knowledge in their minds while making decisions that can determine the fate of their patients. Veterinarians save tens of thousands of beloved pets and prevent epidemics among farm animals, which in many ways also means protecting human populations. Thank you, veterinarians. #Veterinarian #Medicine #Animals #edit #Pets

Le chirurgien plasticien José Soler-Baillo, qui exerce à Miami, est devenu viral après la publication de vidéos filmées pendant ses opérations. En plein bloc opératoire, il s’ambiance sur de la house. Une pratique courante chez certains chirurgiens, car la diffusion de musique peut favoriser la concentration et créer un climat de travail plus détendu. Cependant, il est beaucoup plus rare de voir des images tournées pendant les opérations être publiées sur les réseaux sociaux. Crédit : @drsolerbaillo / IG

🎬 TREND — o café que revela a mensagem A câmera está posicionada como se fôssemos o copo transparente colocado sob a máquina de espresso. À medida que o café vai enchendo, o líquido cobre o fundo do copo e o texto começa a aparecer — revelando informações como “Estamos abertos”, horário de funcionamento, dias da semana e a marca do local. 💡 IDEIA — usar o próprio preparo como revelação O enchimento do copo funciona como efeito de transição, revelando a mensagem aos poucos enquanto o café é servido. 🔥 USOS POSSÍVEIS • Informar horário de funcionamento de forma criativa • Revelar promoções ou mensagens curtas • Inserir marca ou assinatura visual do negócio 📌 Crédito da ideia: @gleeful_coffee #PadocaCriativa #TrendDoDia #Viral #cafeteria #conteudocriativo #marketingvisual

As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. This isn’t a routine that I think everyone *needs* to do, but for those who are also interested in promoting scalp health & improving hair retention, hopefully this gives you some steps to choose from that might help! Also- the results I’ve seen would only be from the scalp serums + shampoos alone because I haven’t been using the scalp device or red light helmet long enough to see any visible change yet. LMK if you want videos on my top recommendations for scalp serums + scalp focused shampoos next! Products Mentioned: 1. Pantene Abundant & Strong Serum 2. Neutrogena Hair Restore Serum  3. OGX Pro Growth + Peptide Shampoo 4. Dr Groot Scalp Revitalizing Hair Thickening Shampoo 5. DS Labs Scalp Activator - this was gifted with no obligation to review 6. 간식도 산책도 전부 거부 ㅠㅠ 과수원 땡볕 아래 겁 많은 집순이 시골개 백구 과수원 땡볕 아래 묶인 잔뜩 겁먹은 쫄보 5살 시골개 ㅠㅠ 🐶 이 집에 강아지가 두 마리 있었는데, 안타깝게도 둘 다 이름 없이 그냥 '백구'라고 불리고 있더라고요 ㅠㅠ 땡볕 쪽에 있는 녀석이 더 급해 보여서 먼저 청소를 시작했습니다! 햇볕 피하라고 그늘막 치는데, 지지대를 몇 번이나 땀 뻘뻘 흘리며 다시 박고 낑낑대며 겨우 완성했어요 🤣 주변에 벌레가 너무 많아서 손으로 잡초를 하나하나 다 뽑아줬습니다! 영상 보셨겠지만 굼벵이랑 콩벌레가 어찌나 많던지, 잡초 제거 진짜 하길 잘했다 싶었어요 👍 집 청소하려고 부르는데 겁먹고 절대 안 나와서 밖으로 빼내는 데 한참 걸렸습니다 🥺 겨우 달래서 집 물청소에 목초액 살균 싹 하고, 가벼운 3M 와이어 목줄로 바꿔줬어요! 근데 특식이랑 우유를 줘도 입도 안 대고 산책도 완강히 거부해서 촬영 내내 너무 걱정됐습니다 ㅠㅠ 혹시 어디 아픈 건 아닌지 마음이 무거웠어요. 먹방 못 찍은 유일한 녀석입니다 😭 집에 푹신한 새 담요랑 밥 잘 놔두고 왔으니 지금쯤은 마음 놓고 다 먹었길 간절히 바라요! 조만간 무조건 다시 와서 형제 강아지 집도 청소해 주고, 요 녀석 상태도 꼼꼼히 확인해서 다시 소식 전해드릴게요! 🐾 영상 보며 따뜻한 마음 보내주시는 모든 분들 정말 감사합니다! 답글을 다 달아드리진 못하지만, 남겨주시는 소중한 댓글은 하나하나 꼼꼼히 다 읽고 있습니다! 늘 죄송하고 감사해요 🥺 마지막으로 제 프로필에 올려둔 링크를 클릭하신 후 리스팅된 쿠팡 제품을 한 번 더 클릭하여, 꼭 해당 제품이 아니더라도 24시간 안에 아무 물품이나 구매해 주시면 쿠팡으로부터 일정 수수료를 지급받아 이 아이들에게 더 맛있는 다음 배달을 준비하는 데 큰 도움이 됩니다. 늘 감사합니다 ✨ #반려견 #시고르자브종 #강아지 #viraltiktok #trending #애견

Well-placed fillers aren’t about “adding volume everywhere.” They’re about enhancing anatomy, restoring lost volume, and creating balance in the right areas. Now add a calorie deficit — and you get a double effect: the face becomes more defined, excess fullness goes away, and the fillers look even cleaner, sharper, and more natural. It’s the combination of: ✨ precise placement ✨ a controlled calorie deficit that creates that “expensive” look — fresh, sculpted, and harmonious without being overdone.
